name: Uninsured employer after my machine work injury, options?
description: Utah Uninsured Fund pays benefits; sue employer.

mainEntity.name: Uninsured employer after my machine work injury, options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah Uninsured Fund pays benefits; sue employer.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah Uninsured Employer Fund covers you; file against it.** Same benefits as insured[1]. Employer personally liable too. Report to Labor Commission. Lawyer recovers max.
